description: Case.caseType — the work TYPE, ORTHOGONAL to status (cr1bd_casestatus). standard = a normal instruction case; audit = a SECOND, independent CE inspection auditing a THIRD-PARTY engineer's ORIGINAL report (ADR-0014), numbered with an `A.` Case/PO prefix and carrying an `engineer_report` Evidence. Set from the parser's `audit` envelope signal (detect_audit_signals); NOT the engineer-report overlay (which merges CE's OWN CNX/EVA report). Default standard.
